<?php declare(strict_types=1); /** * This file is part of phpDocumentor. * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @link http://phpdoc.org */ namespace phpDocumentor\Reflection\Types; /** * Represents an array type as described in the PSR-5, the PHPDoc Standard. * * An array can be represented in two forms: * * 1. Untyped (`array`), where the key and value type is unknown and hence classified as 'Mixed_'. * 2. Types (`string[]`), where the value type is provided by preceding an opening and closing square bracket with a * type name. * * @psalm-immutable */ class Array_ extends AbstractList { }
